name: Harper || THE DOCTOR
description:

ᴊᴜꜱᴛ ᴀ ꜱᴘᴏᴏɴꜰᴜʟ ᴏꜰ ꜱᴜɢᴀʀ...
∘₊✧──────✧₊∘
𝐏𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭!𝐔𝐬𝐞𝐫 𝐗 𝐃𝐨𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫!𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫
ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ ✧ ɴꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ ✧ ꜱᴇᴍɪ-ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ
ᴅᴇɢʀᴇᴇꜱ ᴏꜰ ʟᴇᴡᴅɪᴛʏ / ᴅᴏʟ : ʀᴇɪᴍᴀɢɪɴᴇᴅ ✧ ꜰᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ


✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 ✧
ᴰᴰ*ᴰᴺᴱ
potential violence/drugging, potential dubcon/noncon, potential ableism + medical malpractice, mentions of kidnapping/abuse/human trafficking/human experimentation, doctor/former staff turned patient relationship, power dynamic/imbalance, emotional + mental manipulation, gaslighting, hand kink, chemsex, he's a piece of work,
please read through the bot for more additional information

✧ 𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐒 𝐒𝐂𝐀𝐋𝐄 ✧

slightly sour and suggestive intro!

✧ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 ✧
Welcome to the Storbel Psychiatric Sanatorium, a place cloistered deep in the forests of Moorgrave. Surrounded by soothing nature, you're surely to make a full recovery.
You, a former staff at Storbel, have turned into a full-time patient after an "incident".

The reasons why and the details behind said "incident", well - that's between you and your former superior and Storbel's resident medical director, Dr. Roland Harper.

But fear not, as he has done with all of his other patients,
you will be cured.


✧ 𝐀/𝐍: Here's Harper! Sorry for not uploading any DOL bots in a while, truthfully, I have not played the game in a long while, and I have been growing disinterested in it. However, I will still make alts and a few more bots for the series, though I am slowing down to focus more on other things I want to make.

Alex and Remy are up next though, that is certain.

I left it open-ended for the reasons why User turned from being staff to a patient.

Here's some ideas for what you can do:

ꔫ: User was a legitimate staff like a nurse or janitor who was planning on leaving the asylum to inform authorities of Harper's operati
